title: parietaria officinalis var. brevipetiolata
intro: Parietaria officinalis var. brevipetiolata, also known as the small petioled pellitory, is a plant species belonging to the Urticaceae family, characterized by its distinctive small leaves and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including inflammation, pain, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antihistamine properties. The health benefits of Parietaria officinalis var. brevipetiolata include relief from headaches, arthritis, and allergies, as well as its potential to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to alleviate symptoms.
